a_material_quality_bar: Land verified MVP progress for a named requirement ID.
Repair a repeatable project automation, script, checker, snapshot, or manifest failure.
Commit an exact blocker with requirement ID, validation command/tool, likely cause, and next action.
validation: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-automation-contract.ps1 -RepoRoot . passed for 7 category automations.
self_improvement: Updated local prompts and scripts/check-automation-contract.ps1 because Bryan changed the automation operating contract to 20x/day, A-material closeout, and project-only automation maintenance.
next_actions: Use the 20x schedule for bounded category runs.
Keep accepted-pass counting evidence-based rather than schedule-count based.
Do not wait for human approvals on project-owned scripts/files/commits; commit exact blockers only for external account/tool authorization gaps.
